---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education
-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2026 - ongoing.

# Work Experience
## Internships
1. TAI, Intern, July 2023
2. MKE, Intern, August 2023
2. TRT, Intern, July 2025

# Competencies
R, Quarto, Git, Python

# Hobbies
- Reading books
- Watching TV series and movies 
- Creating art and illustrations

# Download My CV
[Download CV](https://github.com/seymaceliker/emu430-spring2026-seymaceliker/blob/main/Seyma%20Celiker%20cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}
